title: croixia luzoniensis
side_effects: Croixia luzoniensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory issues in some individuals. Ingesting the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while prolonged exposure to its extracts may cause liver and kidney damage. Improper use of Croixia luzoniensis has also been linked to increased heart rate and blood pressure, posing a risk to individuals with pre-existing cardiovascular conditions. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using this plant for any health purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
